purpose: Resume full target-framework collector runs from the measured data already committed in this PR.
important_note: This is a continuation manifest, not a collector-native resume checkpoint. Do not synthesize collector/collect.py checkpoint JSON by hand; let collector/collect.py create per-module checkpoint files under each --checkpoint-dir as real tasks pass, fail, or hit expected failures.
resume_commands: From the aic-matrix-healer repo, regenerate the exact job list with: uv run python scripts/plan_support_matrix_collections.py --matrix-csv support_matrices/a100_sxm.csv --gpu-type a100_sxm --target <backend>=<version> --format commands
Run emitted collector commands on an A100-SXM debug node. They use --shuffle --checkpoint-dir /mnt/aic_debug/notes/support_matrix_fix/checkpoints/<job> --resume --resume-retry-failed --keep-csv.

After each successful collector run, sync generated perf outputs into src/aiconfigurator/systems/data/a100_sxm/<backend>/<version>/, commit a small signed checkpoint to this PR branch, rerun validate_database for that backend/version, then replay exact non-PASS support-matrix cells for that backend/version only.

known_state.sglang=0.5.12: Exact parquet data exists and validate_database passed, but full registry-derived framework collection evidence is not complete.
known_state.trtllm=1.3.0rc15: Exact parquet data exists, validate_database passed, and eight repaired rows replayed; tp8/custom-allreduce rows still need multi-GPU/topology follow-up.
known_state.vllm=0.22.0: Partial exact parquet data exists in this PR; validate_database still fails on generation_attention coverage and needs additional A100-SXM collection.
